name: Sinigang Na Isda (Fish in Sour Soup)
recipeIngredient: 3 lbs halibut fish, bone and sliced
3 fresh spinach leaves, cut into 3-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a covered soup pot over medium-high heat, bring rice water, onion, and tomato to a boil.
2. Reduce heat to medium. Add diakon, eggplants, juice of one lemon, hot chili pepper, fish sauce, a little salt, and pepper.
3. Simmer for 8 minutes.
4. Add the halibut fish and simmer for another 10-15 minutes until cooked.
5. Turn off the heat. Adjust seasonings to taste.
6. Add spinach and cover for 1-2 minutes.
7. Serve immediately in bowls, sprinkling with a little lemon juice for extra tartness. Serves 4-5.
